response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the technical requirements: strong TypeScript/Node.js, React, PostgreSQL-adjacent SQL experience, Kubernetes, AWS, and even AI-agent/MCP work matching the nice-to-haves. However, with nearly two decades of experience and current Staff-level title, they are significantly overqualified for an entry-level position, raising real concerns about salary expectations, retention, and role fit. Berlin location supports the on-site requirement.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and fullstack experience across product companies
Covers nice-to-haves: AI/LLM tooling (MCP), AWS, Kubernetes, Docker
Local to Berlin with strong testing/craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Heavily overqualified for a junior/mid entry-level role — retention and compensation mismatch risk
No direct Nest.js or PostgreSQL experience listed (MongoDB/MySQL instead)
May find junior-scoped responsibilities unengaging, limiting long-term fit
